summary: Frontend UI testing of PhotoAlbumEditor component completed. All 17 features from the test request are working correctly. The editor loads at /fotoalbum/:productId with 20 default pages, page navigation (prev/next/thumbnail), drag & drop upload zone, image preview with delete button, page thumbnails grid, add/remove pages (+2/+10/-2), size selection (4 options), quantity controls, price calculation with extra page costs (5 kr per page beyond 20), and add to cart integration.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Nested button HTML issue in page thumbnails grid - changed outer <button> to <div> with role='button' to maintain accessibility while fixing invalid HTML
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing product ID: a59a4b01-95d6-43e9-8174-62dbc9ef7ccc (Personligt Fotoalbum)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PhotoAlbumEditor component at /fotoalbum/:productId is fully functional. Uses react-dropzone for file upload. Default 20 pages, min 10, max 80. Extra pages cost 5 kr each beyond 20. All data-testid attributes present for testing. Add to cart integrates with CartContext and navigates to /varukorg on success.

frontend.prev_next_navigation: ✓ Prev/next arrows work, prev disabled on page 1
frontend.thumbnail_navigation: ✓ Clicking thumbnail navigates to that page
frontend.dropzone_visible: ✓ Drag & drop upload zone is clickable
frontend.image_upload: ✓ File upload works via dropzone input
frontend.image_preview: ✓ Uploaded image shows in preview area
frontend.min_pages_limit: ✓ Cannot go below 10 pages, button disabled at minimum
frontend.size_selection: ✓ 4 size buttons work (A4 Liggande, A4 Stående, A5 Kvadrat, 30x30cm)
frontend.price_calculation: ✓ Base 349 kr + 5 kr per extra page beyond 20 (e.g., 22 pages = 359 kr)
frontend.price_with_quantity: ✓ Total updates with quantity (359 x 2 = 718 kr)
frontend.add_to_cart_disabled: ✓ Button disabled when no images uploaded
frontend.add_to_cart_action: ✓ Adds album to cart and navigates to /varukorg
frontend.back_button: ✓ Back button navigates away from editor

ui_verification_notes.design_quality: Clean, modern design with proper spacing and contrast
ui_verification_notes.responsive: Left panel (editor) and right panel (options) layout
ui_verification_notes.data_testid_coverage: Comprehensive data-testid attributes on all interactive elements
ui_verification_notes.toast_notifications: Success toasts shown for image upload, page additions, and add to cart

bug_fix_applied.issue: Nested <button> inside <button> in page thumbnails grid causing HTML validation warning
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed outer <button> to <div> with role='button', tabIndex={0}, and onKeyDown handler for accessibility
